Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff?S Form Interrogatories Set Two From Defendant John Douglas Martin
Off Calendar May-09-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: PLAINTIFFS CRYSTAL ESPINOSA AN INDIVIDUAL, and SYDNEY HOPKINS' Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff's Form Interrogatories Set Two From Defendant John Douglas Martin.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiffs Crystal Espinosa and Sydney Hopkins' Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs' Form Interrogatories Set Two From Defendant John Douglas Martin is OFF CALENDAR in light of the stay ordered on May 5, 2025.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Dismiss Or Stay The Consolidated Action Pending Completion Of Arbitration
Off Calendar May-05-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Megan Klein, Esq. 310-299-7592 BD & J for Plaintiff.
Jaymee David, Esq. 510-540-4881 Bremer Whyte Brownn & O'Meara LLP for Defendant.
Court reporter: Judi Johnson, CSR #14174, 516-965-6565, officialreporter@pm.me

ARGUED. The Court indicates it has received a timely contest from Defense and an untimely contest from Plaintiff. Ms. David is not ontesting but clarifies when the stay should start. Ms. Klein apologizes for the time mix up since attorney of record is out of the country. Ms. Klein requests outstanding discovery matters to proceed in exception of the stay.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. The stay is effective immediately.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT JOHN MARTIN's Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Dismiss Or Stay The Consolidated Action Pending Completion Of Arbitration.

Defendant John Martin's Motion to Compel Arbitration and to Dismiss or Stay the Consolidated Action Pending Completion of Arbitration is GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Judi Johnson, CSR #14174, 516-965-6565, officialreporter@pm.me, Reported. (302/JMQ)

DEFENDANT JOHN MARTIN's Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Dismiss Or Stay The Consolidated Action Pending Completion Of Arbitration.

The Court vacates the tentative ruling. The matter is continued to 4/21/25 at 9am in Dept. 302; on the condition that hard courtesy copies of all filings connected to the motion be delivered to D302 by noon on 4/9/25. If no hard copies are received, the matter will be taken off-calendar.
